featureName: Rename Autre to Garant + Proprietaire Fixes
description: Replace the 'autre' contact type with 'garant' (guarantor) in the creation wizard. Add info cards for all contact types. Ensure garant is correctly linked to baux via contract_contacts.role='garant'. Fix proprietaire gaps in display constants and edit form.

userStories.title: Zod schemas + API mapping for garant
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the API to accept 'garant' as a valid role so that the wizard can send it without 400 errors.
acceptanceCriteria: 'garant' added to inviteUserSchema.role and createContactSchema.role Zod enums
'garant' mapped to { role: 'prestataire', provider_category: 'autre' } in invite-user route
Contract linking uses 'garant' role when contactType is garant
userStories.notes: Added 'garant' to both Zod enums (inviteUserSchema + createContactSchema). Added mapping in invite-user route. Contract linking: role === 'garant' ? 'garant' : locataire/autre logic.

userStories.title: Wizard creation: rename autre → garant across 4 step files
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to create a garant contact with a clear info card explaining this role cannot be invited to the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Type union updated from 'autre' to 'garant' in all 4 wizard files
SelectItem shows 'Garant' with Shield icon and amber info card
customRoleDescription text field removed from step-1
Step-3 shows amber non-invitable card for garant
Step-4 confirmation shows garant label with amber colors
inviteToApp forced to false for garant

userStories.title: Edit form + display constants: add proprietaire & garant
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see correct labels when viewing/editing proprietaire and garant contacts.
acceptanceCriteria: edit-contact-client.tsx: type union includes proprietaire and garant
edit-contact-client.tsx: validRoles includes both, mappings corrected
edit-contact-client.tsx: inviteToApp forced false for proprietaire and garant
contact-details/constants.ts: USER_ROLES includes proprietaire (purple) and garant (amber)
